/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libwarehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/warehouse_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/warehouse_interfaces/srv/detail/assign_task__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
